verbGlossary.PRICED FROM: {source}prices built up from actual productivity rates observed on prior projects
verbGlossary.ESTIMATED AGAINST: Bid quantities estimated against field-measured {target}s from similar completed work

verbGlossary.MANDATES: {source} mandates {target} entries to verify work meets contract quality standards

verbGlossary.RELEASED UPON: {source} funds released upon demonstrated field productivity reaching contractual thresholds
verbGlossary.BENCHMARKED AGAINST: {source} release milestones benchmarked against plan percent complete to confirm sufficient progress

verbGlossary.COVERS: {source} coverage for equipment deployed on the project
